text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, on our way back from a day out...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have a surprise for you, Trainer! ☆ Hehe! ☆ It's
my grand plan of gratitude! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Remember that time you helped me study for my
test?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've been wanting to return the favor for the
longest time! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't say that! An Umadol always reciprocates
any encouragement she receives! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've decided to tag along wherever you
wanna go today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a shame to turn her down, so I decide
to take her up on the offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There just so happens to be a race I wanted to
watch, so we head to the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we haven't even gotten inside yet and I'm
already excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's get the best seats! ♪ Come on, Trainer! Let's
move! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now that we have great seats, I'll get us some
snacks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You can't cheer on an empty stomach, after all! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yakisoba, fried chicken, deep-fried skewers, imagawayaki, ice cream... I can't decide! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, might as well splurge and get one of
everything! ☆ Don't worry, Trainer, I'll get your
share too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Keep going! Come on, you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Just a bit further—whoa!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that, Trainer?! That last spurt just
before the finish line?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Am I... the only one having fun right now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to show my thanks by spending time
with you today...
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I'm having fun too.
Don't worry, I'm having fun too.
I'm just happy that you're having a good time.
I'm just happy that you're having a good time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to show my thanks by spending time
with you today...
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I'm having fun too.
Don't worry, I'm having fun too.
I'm just happy that you're having a good time.
I'm just happy that you're having a good time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
D-do you really mean it? I guess that means my
plan to show my gratitude was a great success! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but grin when I see you smile,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm gonna keep cheering until my voice
goes hoarse! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: L-O-V-E! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like I thought, races and concerts are best
experienced in person! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We spend the entire day enjoying the races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But that's all backwards! I'm supposed
to be the one thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... All I want to do is put your feelings first...
Why isn't it working?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I'm forcing you to be considerate of me, I've
still got a long way to go before I can become a
first-rate Umadol...
choice_data_list:
Your honest efforts are more than enough to
make me happy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Really? All right, then let's do it like this! ☆ I'll
put my all into having an absolute blast! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And just like I always do for my fans at my
performances, I'll make sure you have a blast
too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Smart Falcon, today will always be a
special memory for me.
